discovery.run_summary: Mixed tape with QQQ/SMH leading on NXPI's blowout (+26%) lifting semis, while small caps, regional banks, and defense lag amid Iran war/oil spike and elevated VIX. Big movers in mid-caps tied to earnings (EXTR, FFIV, PTCT, BLDR) ahead of MAG7 prints after the bell.

notable_index_moves: SMH +1.7% on NXPI earnings beat; broader semis bid
XLE +2.3% with Brent $118 on Iran blockade headlines
KRE -1.9% and IWM -0.7% — risk-off in small/regional banks despite Fed hold
ITA -1.4% — defense weak even with active Iran war, worth flagging
VIX +3.8% to 18.5 ahead of MAG7 earnings

discovery.no_signals_note: No Truth Social posts in feed. Note: several mover catalysts (EXTR, FFIV, PTCT, SAIA, DECK) are not directly cited in the news feed provided — Michael should verify earnings dates/press releases before acting on any of these reads. Also flag: ITA -1.4% during active Iran war is anomalous and worth a separate look.

ai_announcements.headline: Firestorm Labs raises $82M / Scout AI raises $100M for military drone/autonomous vehicle AI
ai_announcements.summary: Two defense AI startups raised significant capital for autonomous drone manufacturing and AI agents controlling autonomous military vehicles, signaling intensifying competition in defense AI.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: AeroVironment has entrenched DoD relationships, existing programs of record (Switchblade, Puma), and scale that startups cannot match in the near term. New entrants validate the category and may expand the overall defense AI/drone budget. AVAV could also acquire or partner.
research_pointers: AVAV down 12.66% over 5 days suggests broader defense/AI rotation, not just today's news
Check whether Scout AI / Firestorm explicitly target Switchblade or Puma replacement use cases
Review AVAV backlog and DoD program-of-record status
Falsifier: if DoD awards next-gen loitering munition contract to a startup over AVAV

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Most large moves today (EXTR +28%, FFIV +8%, PTCT -8%, BLDR -5%, SAIA -5%, DECK -4.6%, VCYT -5%) appear unrelated to the AI announcements in the news set — likely earnings/guidance driven (EXTR and FFIV both networking names reporting; BLDR/SAIA/DECK are cyclical names with their own demand stories; PTCT/VCYT are healthcare). No clear AI-news-to-stock causal link for these. AVAV is the only name with a plausible (though weak) AI-news connection via defense drone startup funding.
